description_long: This object is a tall, slender rectangular obelisk with a minimalist, modern design. Its structure is defined by a narrow, elongated vertical shaft with a consistent width and a flat top, lacking any tapering or pointed tip. The obelisk is framed by a dark, metallic material, and its central section is open, forming a large rectangular void that passes through the entire height. The surfaces are smooth and appear to be made of metal, giving it a sleek, industrial look. There are no visible inscriptions, engravings, or decorative motifs on any side. The base is integrated seamlessly with the shaft, maintaining the same width and material throughout.
description: A modern, rectangular obelisk with a hollow center and smooth, dark metallic surfaces. The design is minimalist, with no visible ornamentation or inscriptions.
description_view_0: A narrow side profile showing the obelisk's thin, elongated form and solid frame.
description_view_1: A front view revealing the large rectangular hollow center framed by the dark metallic structure.
description_view_2: Another narrow side profile, identical to view 0, emphasizing the obelisk's slimness.
description_view_3: A rear view similar to the front, displaying the open rectangular void and the clean, metallic frame.
attribute_base_design: The base is a simple rectangular extension of the shaft, flush with the rest of the structure, with no steps, platforms, or decorative features. It is made of the same dark metallic material as the rest of the obelisk.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and rectangular, matching the shaft's width and lacking any unique features or decorations.
